name: Missile Command
description: Missile Command is a fast-paced arcade game centered around defense. The player defends six cities located along the bottom of the screen from waves of incoming ballistic missiles. The missiles originate from various points in the sky and descend towards the cities and the player's defense batteries. The player controls a targeting cursor and launches counter-missiles from three fixed launch sites (defense batteries) – one on the left, one in the center, and one on the right of the screen. When a counter-missile detonates, it creates a blast radius that destroys any enemy missiles within its area of effect. Cities and defense batteries destroyed by enemy missiles are permanently lost. The game progresses through increasingly difficult waves of missiles. The game ends when all cities are destroyed. A player can score points by destroying enemy missiles and surviving waves. Extra cities can be awarded at certain score thresholds.

controls.q: Launch missile from left defense battery towards current cursor position
controls.e: Launch missile from right defense battery towards current cursor position
controls.space: Launch missile from center defense battery towards current cursor position
